name: Drift
description: Pairs of spores floating through still water, the small one trailing its leader — each redraw carries every pair somewhere new.

code.style: --s1: @rand(11%, 26%); --s2: @rand(6%, 15%); --x1: @rand(5%, 70%); --y1: @rand(5%, 70%); --x2: @rand(10%, 78%); --y2: @rand(10%, 78%); --rule: ( /* leader and follower share one emitted color */ --mote: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--s1); left: var(--x1); top: var(--y1); border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--mote); opacity: 0.9; transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--s2); left: var(--x2); top: var(--y2); border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--mote); opacity: 0.4; transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
